description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white and gray color palette. The front facade includes large glass sliding doors that open onto a spacious patio with a green lawn, outdoor seating, and a barbecue area. The upper floor has a private terrace with outdoor furniture, accessible via large windows or doors, and the house is surrounded by a low, white privacy fence. The side and rear views reveal additional large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces, and a small pool is integrated into the ground-level patio. The entryway is defined by a straight walkway flanked by planters, leading to a recessed main door. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on outdoor living and open, airy spaces.
description: A sleek, modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a private terrace, and a spacious patio with a pool and outdoor kitchen, all enclosed by a white privacy fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass doors, patio with green lawn, pool, outdoor kitchen, and privacy fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper terrace, side windows, and the continuation of the privacy fence around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, minimal window openings, and the back section of the privacy fence.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view showing the walkway to the main entrance, planters, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a straight walkway, flanked by planters, and large glass doors; no porch or overhang.
